claim_ceiling: status/receipt routing only; repo artifacts remain scratch_diagnostic with promotion_allowed=false and formal_admission_allowed=false; no final M(C), carrier finality, QIT-engine, Axis0, bridge, gravity, physics, SM, GR, or canonical promotion

cvc5.claim: cvc5 agrees with z3 over the same computed antisymmetry-defect coefficients.

z3.claim: Given computed O structure constants, antisymmetry violation is UNSAT; given computed S table, violation is SAT; erasing O bindings flips to SAT.

cvc5.claim: Independent cvc5 check over the same computed O associator coefficients agrees with z3.

z3.claim: Given computed O associator coefficients, asserting all basis-triple associators are zero is UNSAT; erasing that zero constraint is SAT.

cvc5.claim: Independent cvc5 mirror of the computed-entry wrong-sign UNSAT / correct SAT / erased SAT proof.

julia_z3.claim: Julia Z3 computed-entry scalar check matches the wrong-sign UNSAT and erased SAT flip.

z3.claim: Wrong-sign Clifford anticommutation over computed octonion-derived residual entries is UNSAT; correct relation is SAT; erasing computed-entry bindings flips wrong-sign to SAT.

cvc5.claim: Independent cvc5 check over the same computed O derivation constraints agrees with z3.

z3.claim: Given computed O derivation constraints and exact free-coordinate count, dimension != 14 is UNSAT and erasing derivation constraints flips the no-extra-solution check to SAT.

cvc5.claim: negated representative Jordan identity component derived from bound J3(O) entries is unsatisfiable

julia_z3.claim: Julia Z3.jl admissibility/control gate over Julia-computed J3(O) values

z3.claim: negated representative Jordan identity component derived from bound J3(O) entries is unsatisfiable

cvc5.claim: Bound S witness components have zero product when product is derived inside solver from computed S table constants

z3.claim: Bound S witness components have zero product when product is derived inside solver from computed S table constants

codex2_cl6_v2_high.tail:
cl6_link_xhigh VERDICT=GENUINE REASON=z3/cvc5 bind L_e1 matrix entries as SMT integers and compute the (0,0) square/anticommutator residual inside the solver rather than asserting precomputed residual integers.
CL6_FIX=none

codex2_cl6_v2_low.tail:
cl6_link_xhigh VERDICT=GENUINE REASON=z3/cvc5 bind the L_e1 matrix entries as SMT integer variables and assert the witness equation over the in-solver sum 2*(L_e1^2)[0,0]-target, so the wrong-sign UNSAT follows from the bound entries rather than a precomputed residual integer.
CL6_FIX=none

codex2_cl6_v2_medium.tail:
cl6_link_xhigh VERDICT=GENUINE REASON=z3/cvc5 bind the L_e1 matrix entries as SMT integers and compute the witness square entry inside the solver before asserting the wrong-sign residual equation.
CL6_FIX=none

codex2_cl6_v2_xhigh.tail:
cl6_link_xhigh VERDICT=GENUINE REASON=z3/cvc5 bind the L_e1 matrix entries as SMT integer variables and assert the solver-derived residual 2*sum_k L[0,k]*L[k,0]-target == 0, so the wrong-sign UNSAT comes from those bindings rather than a precomputed residual integer.
CL6_FIX=none

codex2_full_pre_cl6_hardening_high.tail:
associator_xhigh VERDICT=GENUINE REASON=The flip binds the computed associator coefficient vector and checks structural zero/nonzero obligations with an erase control rather than a scalar count or boolean.
alternativity_current VERDICT=GENUINE REASON=The solver derives antisymmetry-defect components from bound Cayley-Dickson table entries and the selected witness triple before the erase flip.
sedenion_current VERDICT=GENUINE REASON=The solver derives zero-product equations from bound factor components and computed structure constants, with O/S and erase/zero-structure controls.
j3o_current VERDICT=GENUINE REASON=The solver derives Jordan and raw-product identity residual components from bound matrix entries and octonion structure constants, not from a precomputed residual scalar.
g2_xhigh VERDICT=GENUINE REASON=The erase flip depends on the computed derivation constraint matrix and RREF/free-coordinate kernel relations encoded as linear solver constraints.
cl6_link_xhigh VERDICT=GENUINE REASON=The SMT check binds per-entry anticommutator residual coefficients computed from octonion left-action matrix products and flips only when those computed-entry bindings are erased.
CL6_FIX=none

codex2_full_pre_cl6_hardening_low.tail:
associator_xhigh VERDICT=GENUINE REASON=SMT binds the computed associator coefficient vector and the UNSAT/SAT flip is over zero/nonzero structural obligations plus erase controls, not a scalar count.
alternativity_current VERDICT=GENUINE REASON=SMT derives the selected associator-antisymmetry defect from bound Cayley-Dickson structure entries, with the O erase/control flip tied to those table bindings.
sedenion_current VERDICT=GENUINE REASON=SMT derives zero-product equations from computed O/S multiplication tables and fixed nonzero vectors, so the S/O and erase-structure flips are product-relation flips.
j3o_current VERDICT=GENUINE REASON=SMT derives a representative Jordan identity residual component from bound A/B entries and octonion structure constants, with the raw-product control changing the structural equation.
g2_xhigh VERDICT=GENUINE REASON=SMT checks derivation-kernel constraints from computed derivation matrix rows and exact free-coordinate relations, so the erase flip depends on matrix/RREF structure rather than only a dimension literal.
cl6_link_xhigh VERDICT=DECORATIVE REASON=z3_status_for_residuals and cvc5_status_for_residuals only bind precomputed anticommutator residual integers and assert them zero, without deriving the matrix-product relation inside SMT from left-action matrix entries or structure constants.
CL6_FIX=Bind L_ei matrix entries or Cayley-Dickson structure constants in SMT and derive each L_i L_j + L_j L_i + 2 delta_ij I entry inside the solver, then run the wrong-sign and erase-binding flip on that derived expression.

codex2_full_pre_cl6_hardening_medium.tail:
associator_xhigh VERDICT=GENUINE REASON=SMT binds computed associator coefficients and the SAT/UNSAT flip is over zero/nonzero structural associator obligations plus erase controls.
alternativity_current VERDICT=GENUINE REASON=SMT derives the antisymmetry defect inside the solver from bound Cayley-Dickson table entries rather than rechecking a precomputed defect scalar.
sedenion_current VERDICT=GENUINE REASON=SMT builds zero-product expressions from computed table constants and bound witness vector entries, so the O/S SAT/UNSAT flip depends on product equations.
j3o_current VERDICT=GENUINE REASON=SMT derives the representative Jordan and raw residual components from bound matrix entries and octonion structure constants.
g2_xhigh VERDICT=GENUINE REASON=SMT checks linear derivation equations using computed constraint-matrix rows and free-coordinate kernel relations, not just a naked dimension count.
cl6_link_xhigh VERDICT=DECORATIVE REASON=SMT only binds precomputed anticommutator residual integers to zero and erases those bindings, so it does not derive the residuals from matrix or multiplication entries.
CL6_FIX=Derive L_ei matrix entries and anticommutator residual equations inside z3/cvc5 from bound Cayley-Dickson structure constants, then run the wrong-sign and erase/control flip on those solver-built equations.

codex2_full_pre_cl6_hardening_xhigh.tail:
associator_xhigh VERDICT=GENUINE REASON=The SMT branch binds the full computed associator coefficient tensor and checks zero/nonzero structural obligations with erase flips, not a scalar residual or count.
alternativity_current VERDICT=GENUINE REASON=The solver derives the antisymmetry-defect expression from bound Cayley-Dickson table entries and flips when computed structure bindings are erased or changed.
sedenion_current VERDICT=GENUINE REASON=The solver derives witness products from computed O/S structure constants and fixed vector entries, with SAT/UNSAT changing on the zero-product equation and table erasure.
j3o_current VERDICT=GENUINE REASON=The flip is over an SMT-derived Jordan-identity residual component from bound J3(O) matrix entries and octonion structure constants, with raw product as the structural control.
g2_xhigh VERDICT=GENUINE REASON=The erase flip is over computed derivation matrix row equations plus free-coordinate/kernel constraints, even though the separate dimension check reuses precomputed rank.
cl6_link_xhigh VERDICT=GENUINE REASON=The flip binds the full computed anticommutator residual-entry vector from Cayley-Dickson left-action matrices and erases those entry bindings, so it is coefficient-level rather than scalar count/rank rechecking.
CL6_FIX=none
